input.question: How many England caps were won by university rugby teammates Will Carling, Chris Oti, and Andy Mullins? Round your answer to the nearest ten.

output.text: Will Carling, Chris Oti, and Andy Mullins were teammates at Durham University, where all three played rugby together [src_10]. Carling went on to win 72 England caps between 1988 and 1996 [src_1], while Oti represented England thirteen times between 1988 and 1991 [src_19]. Andy Mullins, however, does not appear to have won any senior England caps; the available sources reference him only as a schoolmate and teammate of Carling at England Schools, Durham University, and Harlequins, without any record of senior international appearances [src_22]. Combining Carling's 72 caps and Oti's 13 caps gives a total of 85, which rounds to approximately 90 England caps.

output.text: Emma Stone won her first Academy Award for Best Actress for La La Land (2016) [src_1]. Her male co-star in that film was Ryan Gosling, who did not win the Academy Award for Best Actor [src_4]. Instead, the Best Actor award at the 89th Academy Awards went to Casey Affleck for Manchester by the Sea [src_4]. Therefore, her costar did not win an Academy Award for Best Actor for that film.
